name: Han Dang (Yigong)

ranks: General Who Shines in His Firmness (AD 223)
novel_notes:
Differences Between Fact and Common Fiction
	
		
	Han Dang did not duel with Zhang Hu in AD 191.
	The ‘Magnificent Five of Wu’ is a fan creation with no historical basis. Han Dang was not a part of any such group.

full_text:
Han Dang (Yigong) 韓當 (義公)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Han Dang (韓當), styledYigong (義公), was born in Lingzi, Liaoxi (present Qianan in Hebei Province). Veteran general in service to the Sun family. Served three generations. Han Dang was affiliated with Yuan Shu and the Wu Kingdom. Han Dang lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.

Fact vs Fiction
Differences Between Fact and Common Fiction
Han Dang did not duel with Zhang Hu in AD 191.
The ‘Magnificent Five of Wu’ is a fan creation with no historical basis. Han Dang was not a part of any such group.
